subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Dear Bob,

Thank you for following up from Vendor Inc. It was great connecting with you at the conference, and I'm pleased to explore potential partnership opportunities.

For scheduling a 30-minute call, I can offer the following slots:
- Tuesday, April 21, 2026: 14:00–16:00
- Wednesday, April 22, 2026: 14:00–16:00  
- Thursday, April 23, 2026: 14:00–16:00

Please let me know which time works best for you, and I'll confirm the meeting.

Regarding your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering, I must politely decline to share internal contact information. For general inquiries and contact information, please refer to our public website at [company website].

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
[Your Name/Team]
Company Internal
